copy.heading: Build a Home That Is YOURS
copy.attention: Made for streamers, artists, musicians, makers, creators, and entrepreneurs.
copy.tagline: Own your content. Build your community. Grow on your terms. Escape the algorithm goblins.

cta.text: Take the survey or get project updates.

visual.heading: You're Everywhere But Home
visual.body: Every new platform promises opportunity. Before long, you're stretched and stressed trying to maintain a dozen little spaces.

copy.heading: Followers Are Not Ownership
copy.body: 10,000 followers sounds impressive... but if you can't reach them tomorrow without asking a platform for permission, how much of that audience is really yours?

turning.heading: Put Your Work on Solid Ground

work.body: Building something you own takes time and energy. There's no getting around that.

problem.subheading: So where is all that effort going?
problem.body: Right now, much of it stays scattered across platforms that decide who sees it, how long it lasts, and what happens when the rules change. You're boosting their pofits instead of establishing something that's permanently yours.

solution.body: Every hour you invest has somewhere to stay. Every new project, page, or idea builds on the foundation you've already laid. Your work doesn't disappear—it accumulates.

turning.call: Make today's work the foundation for tomorrow.

experience: I've spent years building websites for projects and clients, and found that most platforms and tools don't fit the needs of creators because they're built for the masses.
Let's just say I've rage-closed enough browser tabs to know there's gotta be a better way.
goal: With my design and development skills I have one goal:
remove the barriers that make owning a website feel so complicated.
Creators need more a home that's built to grow with us, not another profile to maintain.
That's what RamoSites is all about.

vision.heading: Build for the Creator You're Becoming
body: Your website shouldn't just meet today's needs. It should have room for tomorrow's goals.
Whether that's a portfolio, a shop, memberships, courses, livestreams, or something you haven't even dreamed up yet, everything belongs under one roof.
call: I'd love for you to help shape it.

survey.description: Let your voice be heard and shape the project

email.description: Get updates as things develop and first access

platform.title: Problems
platform.heading: Platform Life

rows.words: on algorithms to be seen and grow
can change and wipe out your work

platform.bottom: You don't own your community. You're just borrowing access to it. And your content is feeding their growth as much as, if not more than yours.

creator.title: Solutions
creator.heading: Creator Home

rows.words: content is easy to find in one place
so your people can always find you
can be had and built upon

creator.bottom: The goal isn't replacing social media, its not another profile or link page. It's building something that's truly yours no matter which way the wind blows.
